name: Goddramon

signature_move.name: God Flame
signature_move.description: 12Explodes its holy spirit, instantly mowing down enemies in all directions.Shoots a stream of flames from its closed fists.

description: Current Original ⇨ Japanese A God Dragon Digimon with six hardened wings and a body that shines gold. On its arm is the proof that it is a holy Digimon, and it is considered a kind of Holy-species Digimon from where it wears its Holy Ring . Goddramon is one of the " Four Great Dragons Digimon"; the four of them are Goddramon, Holydramon , Qinglongmon , and Megidramon . Also, the tiny dragon Digimon sealed within the vambrace on Goddramon's right hand is called " Amon of Red Flame", who governs over "Destruction", [N 1] and the one sealed within the vambrace on its left hand is called " Umon of Blue Thunder", who governs over "Regeneration". [N 2] to attack its opponents. Its Special Move is exploding its holy spirit, instantly mowing down the opponents in every direction ( God Flame ).
